creator: drr.backup@gmail.com
text:
Libreoffice not following system theme under KDE/plasma 5.27.11, after it was upgraded to 24.8.2.1 recently. It loads with a basic windows-like theme instead and results in core dump for me on closing.
Seems other users are affected too; there is a thread on this issue on the Forum: https://forums.FreeBSD.org/threads/libreoffice-system-theme-and-global-menu-broken-after-update.95334/
